message:
fix(providers): add text_start/text_end events to stream fixtures + remove redundant binding

Update Gemini and OpenAI stream test fixtures to include text_start and
text_end lifecycle events, aligning fixtures with the updated provider
event model that emits explicit content boundary markers. All scenarios
(simple, multi-delta, truncation, error, tool-use interleaved) now
include text_start at content start and text_end with accumulated content
at content end.

Also remove a redundant `let allow_unsafe_sync_exec = allow_unsafe_sync_exec`
binding in extensions_js.rs (clippy: unnecessary rebinding of a Copy value
already captured by the closure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
